languages.text: "{name}, я конечно понимаю, псайкеры опасны — но взгляни на меня. Кажется, я не зря трачу корабельный кислород, а? Те, у кого опыта побольше, могут надрывать завесу Имматериума точно, словно медикарий, вскрывающий раны — тогда эхо будет еще долго привлекать {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}ксеносов{/g}. А самых талантливых псайкеров... ну, уверена, в протекторате им найдется применение".

traits.locale_text: "{name}, я конечно понимаю, псайкеры опасны — но взгляни на меня. Кажется, я не зря трачу корабельный кислород, а? Те, у кого опыта побольше, может надрывать завесу Имматериума точно, словно медикарий, вскрывающий раны — тогда эхо будет еще долго привлекать {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}ксеносов{/g}. А самых талантливых псайкеров... ну, уверена, в протекторате им найдется применение".

languages.text: "{name}, I know psykers are dangerous, of course — but look at me. I'm hardly a waste of the ship's oxygen, am I? Psykers with more experience can tear through the veil of the Immaterium with precision, like a medicae officer opening up a wound — then the echoes will attract {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} for a long time to come. And the most talented psykers... well, I'm sure you could find a use for them in the protectorate."

traits.locale_text: "{name}, I know psykers are dangerous, of course — but look at me. I'm hardly a waste of the ship's oxygen, am I? Psykers with more experience can tear through the veil of the Immaterium with precision, like a medicae officer opening up a wound — then the echoes will attract xenos for a long time to come. And the most talented psykers... well, I'm sure you could find a use for them in the protectorate."

And the most talented psykers... well, I'm sure you could find a use for them in the protectorate."

languages.text: 「{name}、サイカーは危険な存在であることはわかっています。でも、私を見てください。私は船の酸素を無駄にしているとは言えません。経験豊富なサイカーは、外科医が傷を開けるように、精巧に物質界のベールを裂き、その反響が{g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}異星人{/g}を引き寄せるのです。そして最も才能のあるサイカーは…保護領にはきっと役立つでしょう」
languages.original_text: "{name}, I know psykers are dangerous, of course — but look at me. I'm hardly a waste of the ship's oxygen, am I? Psykers with more experience can tear through the veil of the Immaterium with precision, like a medicae officer opening up a wound — then the echoes will attract {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} for a long time to come. And the most talented psykers... well, I'm sure you could find a use for them in the protectorate."

traits.locale_text: 「{name}、サイカーは危険な存在であることはわかっています。でも、私を見てください。私は船の酸素を無駄にしているとは hardly 言えません。経験豊富なサイカーは、外科医が傷を開けるように、精巧に物質界のベールを裂き、その反響が異星人を引き寄せるのです。そして最も才能のあるサイカーは… protectorate にはきっと役立つでしょう。」
「{name}、サイカーは危険な存在であることはわかっています。でも、私を見てください。私は船の酸素を無駄にしているとは言えません。経験豊富なサイカーは、外科医が傷を開けるように、精巧に物質界のベールを裂き、その反響が{g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}異星人{/g}を引き寄せるのです。そして最も才能のあるサイカーは…保護領にはきっと役立つでしょう」

languages.text: «{name}, ya sé que los psíquicos son peligrosos, pero míreme. No soy precisamente un estorbo, ¿verdad? Los psíquicos más experimentados pueden rasgar el velo del Inmaterio con precisión, igual que un oficial medicae abre una herida. Entonces, los ecos atraerán a los {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} durante mucho tiempo. En cuanto a los psíquicos con mayor talento... seguro que el protectorado puede darles algún uso».
languages.original_text: "{name}, I know psykers are dangerous, of course — but look at me. I'm hardly a waste of the ship's oxygen, am I? Psykers with more experience can tear through the veil of the Immaterium with precision, like a medicae officer opening up a wound — then the echoes will attract {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} for a long time to come. And the most talented psykers... well, I'm sure you could find a use for them in the protectorate."

traits.locale_text: «{name}, ya sé que los psíquicos son peligrosos, pero míreme. No soy precisamente un estorbo, ¿verdad? Los psíquicos más experimentados pueden rasgar el velo del Inmaterio con precisión, igual que un oficial medicae abre una herida. Entonces, los ecos atraerán a los {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} durante mucho tiempo. En cuanto a los psíquicos con mayor talento... seguro que el protectorado puede darles algún uso».

languages.text: “{name}，我当然知道灵能者很危险。可是，看看我吧。我不算是浪费舰船氧气的废物吧？经验丰富的灵能者能精准撕开亚空间障壁，如同医务官切开创口——届时，散逸的回响会在长时间内持续吸引{g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}异形{/g}。至于那些天赋最高的灵能者……相信您的属地上肯定用得着。”
languages.original_text: "{name}, I know psykers are dangerous, of course — but look at me. I'm hardly a waste of the ship's oxygen, am I? Psykers with more experience can tear through the veil of the Immaterium with precision, like a medicae officer opening up a wound — then the echoes will attract {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} for a long time to come. And the most talented psykers... well, I'm sure you could find a use for them in the protectorate."

traits.locale_text: “{name}，我当然知道灵能者很危险。可是，看看我吧。我不算是浪费舰船氧气的废物吧？经验丰富的灵能者能精准撕开亚空间障壁，如同医务官切开创口——届时，散逸的回响会在长时间内持续吸引{g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}异形{/g}。至于那些天赋最高的灵能者……相信您的属地上肯定用得着。”

languages.text: "{name}, Ich weiß, Psioniker sind gefährlich, natürlich ... aber seht mich an. Ich bin gewiss keine Vergeudung von Sauerstoff, oder? Psioniker mit mehr Erfahrung können den Schleier des Immateriums mit der Präzision eines Medicae-Offiziers durchdringen, der eine Wunde öffnet ... und dann werden die Echos für lange Zeit {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}Xenos{/g} anlocken. Und die besonders talentierten Psioniker ... nun, ich bin sicher, Ihr hättet im Protektorat Verwendung für sie."
languages.original_text: "{name}, I know psykers are dangerous, of course — but look at me. I'm hardly a waste of the ship's oxygen, am I? Psykers with more experience can tear through the veil of the Immaterium with precision, like a medicae officer opening up a wound — then the echoes will attract {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} for a long time to come. And the most talented psykers... well, I'm sure you could find a use for them in the protectorate."

Psioniker mit mehr Erfahrung können den Schleier des Immateriums mit der Präzision eines Medicae-Offiziers durchdringen, der eine Wunde öffnet ... und dann werden die Echos für lange Zeit {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}Xenos{/g} anlocken. Und die besonders talentierten Psioniker ... nun, ich bin sicher, Ihr hättet im Protektorat Verwendung für sie."

languages.text: "{name}, ruhsezerlerin tehlikeli olduğunu biliyorum elbette... Fakat bana bak. Geminin oksijenini boşa harcamıyorum, değil mi? Daha deneyimli ruhsezerler, bir yarayı açan sıhhiye subayı gibi Tindiyar'ın örtüsünü hassasiyetle yırtabilir. O zaman yankılar, {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}zenoları{/g} uzun süre cezbedecektir. En yetenekli ruhsezerlerse... Şey, eminim onlara protektorada yapacak bir iş bulabilirsin."
languages.original_text: "{name}, I know psykers are dangerous, of course — but look at me. I'm hardly a waste of the ship's oxygen, am I? Psykers with more experience can tear through the veil of the Immaterium with precision, like a medicae officer opening up a wound — then the echoes will attract {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} for a long time to come. And the most talented psykers... well, I'm sure you could find a use for them in the protectorate."

En yetenekli ruhsezerlerse... Şey, eminim onlara protektorada yapacak bir iş bulabilirsin."

languages.text: « {name}, j'ai bien conscience que les psykers sont dangereux, mais... regardez-moi. Ne suis-je pas un atout considérable pour votre vaisseau ? Les psykers expérimentés savent trancher le voile de l'Immaterium avec une grande précision, comme un officier de medicae le ferait pour nettoyer une blessure. Les échos attireront les {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xénos{/g} pendant un bon moment. Quant aux psykers les plus talentueux... vous leur trouverez bien une utilité au sein du protectorat. »
languages.original_text: "{name}, I know psykers are dangerous, of course — but look at me. I'm hardly a waste of the ship's oxygen, am I?
